subcodes.first_line: Thou seest me, O my God, with my spirit, my essence, my reality and my being, confessing my powerlessness, my poverty and my nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ترانی یا الهی معترفا بروحی و ذاتی و حقیقتی و کینونتی بعجزی و فقری و فناای
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
